subcodes.first_line: All glory be unto Thee, O Lord of Names, Who hast turned joy to sorrow and raised up the pavilions of grief on Thy feast day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک البهاء یا مالک الاسماء بما بدلت الفرح بالغم و نصبت خیام الاحزان فی عیدک
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
